member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.AggregateValidationException.Aggregate(System.Action[])
member.summary: Executes a series of deferred validation checks and throws a single aggregated exception if any fail.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.AggregateValidationException.Aggregate(System.String,System.Action[])
member.summary: Executes a series of deferred validation checks and throws a single aggregated exception with a custom message if any fail.
member.param: The message for the aggregated exception.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.PasswordValidationException
member.summary: Represents an exception that is thrown when password validation fails.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.PasswordValidationException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.PasswordValidationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.PasswordValidationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.PasswordValidationException.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a collection of validation errors.
member.param: The validation errors associated with the exception.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.PasswordValidationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified message and validation errors.
member.param: The message that describes the error.
The validation errors associated with the exception.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.PasswordValidationException.Errors
member.summary: Gets the password validation errors associated with this exception.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.PasswordValidationException.FromPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a from the specified password.
member.returns: A containing the validation errors.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNameNotAvailableException
member.summary: Represents an exception related to username validation during identity operations.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNameNotAvailableException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNameNotAvailableException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a default existence message.
member.param: The username involved in the exception.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNameNotAvailableException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNameNotAvailableException.ThrowIfExists``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws a if the specified user is not null. Used to guard against duplicate usernames.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNameNotAvailableException.ThrowIfNotExist``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws a if the specified user is null. Used to guard against missing usernames.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNameNotAvailableException.ThrowIfNotAvailable``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws a if the specified user is not null. Used to guard against usernames that are unavailable for registration.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException
member.summary: Represents an exception thrown when a user is expected to exist but is not found in the store.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.#ctor(System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a formatted message.
member.param: The ID of the user that was not found.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.ThrowIfNull``1(``0)
member.summary: Throws a if the specified user is null.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.ThrowIfNull``1(``0,System.Object)
member.summary: Throws a if the specified user is null, using the provided ID for context.
member.param: The ID to include in the exception message.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundForLoginException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a user with the specified username is not found in the database during login. Indicates that registration is required for the user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundForLoginException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundForLoginException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. This exception is triggered when a user with the given username was not found in the database, and registration is required.
member.param: The username that was not found.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundForLoginException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserNotFoundForLoginException.UserName
member.summary: Gets the username for which the user was not found.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Exceptions.UserValidationException
member.summary: Exception thrown when one or more user validation rules fail. Carries a list of validation errors.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Extensions.AuthenticationContextExtensions
member.summary: Provides mapping helpers for authentication context models.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Extensions.AuthenticationContextExtensions.ToAuthContext(StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Models.AuthenticationContext)
member.summary: Converts an instance to an record.
member.returns: The mapped instance.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Extensions.IdentityResultExtensions.ToErrorString(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.IdentityResult)
member.summary: Converts the to a string representation of its errors.
member.returns: "Success" if the result succeeded; otherwise, a semicolon-separated list of error codes and descriptions.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Models.AuthenticationContext
member.summary: Represents the input payload for authentication validation. Used to validate session, tenant, and scope context before issuing tokens or granting access.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Models.AuthenticationContext.SessionId
member.summary: The session identifier associated with the authentication request. Must be a non-empty GUID string.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Models.AuthenticationContext.TenantId
member.summary: The tenant identifier under which the authentication is scoped. Must be a non-empty GUID string.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Models.AuthenticationContext.Scopes
member.summary: The list of scopes requested by the client. Each scope must be recognized and authorized.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Models.IdentityKey
member.summary: Represents the supported key types for identity entities. Used to configure identity infrastructure and test scenarios.

member.name: F:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Models.IdentityKey.Guid
member.summary: Globally unique identifier (GUID) key type. Recommended for distributed systems and secure identity generation.

member.name: F:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Models.IdentityKey.String
member.summary: String-based key type. Commonly used in default ASP.NET Identity setups.

member.name: F:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Models.IdentityKey.Int
member.summary: Integer-based key type. Useful for legacy systems or simple identity models.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Access.RoleValidator
member.summary: Validates that a role is part of an allowed set of roles.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Access.RoleValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the input role is allowed.
member.returns: An indicating success if the role is valid, or failure if it is not recognized.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Access.ScopeValidator
member.summary: Validates that requested scopes are known and authorized.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Access.ScopeValidator.Validate(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Validates that all requested scopes are known and allowed.
member.param: The list of scopes to validate.
member.returns: An indicating success if all scopes are valid, or failure if any unknown scopes are found.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Access.SessionIdValidator
member.summary: Validates that a session ID is present and non-empty.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Access.SessionIdValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the specified session ID.
member.returns: An indicating success if the ID is valid, or failure if it is missing or empty.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Access.TenantIdValidator
member.summary: Validates that a tenant ID is present, well-formed, and not Guid.Empty.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Access.TenantIdValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the specified tenant ID string.
member.returns: An indicating success if the ID is valid, or failure if it is missing, malformed, or represents Guid.Empty.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Composite.AuthenticationContextValidator
member.summary: Composite validator that ensures an authentication context is valid. Validates provider name, session ID format, and identity status.
Constructs the validator with injected domain validators.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Composite.AuthenticationContextValidator.Validate(StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Composite.AuthContext)
member.summary: Validates the given authentication context. Returns the first failure encountered, or success if all validations pass.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Composite.AuthContext
member.summary: Represents the input payload for authentication validation.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Composite.AuthContext.#ctor(System.String,System.String,StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.IdentityStatus)
member.summary: Represents the input payload for authentication validation.

member.summary: Validates that a user's email has been confirmed.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.EmailConfirmedValidator.Validate(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Validates the email confirmation status.
member.returns: An indicating success if confirmed, or failure if not confirmed.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.EmailRequiredValidator
member.summary: Validates that an email address is present and non-empty.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.EmailRequiredValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the specified email input.
member.returns: An indicating success if the email is present, or failure if it is missing or empty.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.IdentityProviderValidator
member.summary: Validates that an identity provider is supported and authorized.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.IdentityProviderValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the input provider is supported.
member.returns: An indicating success if the provider is valid, or failure if it is unsupported.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.IdentityStatusValidator
member.summary: Validates that an identity status is active and authorized.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.IdentityStatusValidator.Validate(StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.IdentityStatus)
member.summary: Validates the specified identity status.
member.returns: An indicating success if the status is valid, or failure if the identity is inactive or unauthorized.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.UserIdValidator
member.summary: Validates that a user ID is present and properly formatted.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.UserIdValidator.Validate(System.Guid)
member.summary: Validates the specified user ID.
member.returns: An indicating success if the ID is valid, or failure if it is empty or malformed.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.UserValidator`1
member.summary: Validates usernames against reserved/blacklisted values and checks for existing users.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Identity.UserValidator`1.ValidateUsernameAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Validates a username asynchronously.
member.exception: Thrown if the username fails any validation rules.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.JwtToken.JwtExpirationValidator.Validate(System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt.JwtSecurityToken)
member.summary: Validates that the JWT token has not expired.
member.returns: A indicating success if the token is valid, or failure if it has expired.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Profile.ReservedUserNameValidator
member.summary: Validates that a username is not part of a reserved list.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Profile.ReservedUserNameValidator.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A collection of reserved usernames to block.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Profile.ReservedUserNameValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the input username is not reserved.
member.returns: An indicating success if the username is allowed, or failure if it is reserved.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Profile.UsernameFormatValidator
member.summary: Validates that a username matches a standard format.
member.remarks: Enforces the following rules: - Starts with a letter - Contains only letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens - Length between 3 and 20 characters.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Profile.UsernameFormatValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the specified username input.
member.returns: A indicating success if the format is valid, or failure with a descriptive message.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Profile.UsernameFormatValidator.ValidateFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the username format after required-value checks have passed.
member.returns: A indicating whether the username format is valid.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Profile.UsernameFormatValidator.UsernameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]{2,19}$
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match an ASCII letter.
○ Match a character in the set [\-0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically at least 2 and at most 19 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.BlacklistPasswordValidator
member.summary: Validates that a password is not present in a predefined blacklist.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.BlacklistPasswordValidator.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A collection of passwords to block.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.BlacklistPasswordValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the input password is not blacklisted.
member.returns: An indicating success if the password is allowed, or failure if it is blacklisted.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.BlacklistPhoneValidator`1
member.summary: Validates that a user's phone number is not blacklisted. Implements IUserValidator to integrate with ASP.NET Core Identity.
member.typeparam: The user type, which must inherit from IdentityUser<Guid>.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.NoWhitespacePasswordValidator
member.summary: Validates that a password does not contain any whitespace characters.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.NoWhitespacePasswordValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the input password contains no whitespace.
member.returns: An indicating success if no whitespace is present, or failure if any whitespace is detected.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.RegexPasswordValidator
member.summary: Validates that a password matches a specified regular expression pattern.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.RegexPasswordValidator.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A human-readable description of the pattern.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.RegexPasswordValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the password matches the configured regex pattern.
member.returns: An indicating success if the pattern matches, or failure with a descriptive message.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.StrictPasswordValidator
member.summary: Validates that a password meets all strict security requirements. Combines multiple validators: format, blacklist, whitespace, and regex-based rules.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.StrictPasswordValidator.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.StrictPasswordValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates the password using all strict rules.
member.returns: An indicating success if all rules pass, or the first failure encountered.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Validators.Security.WhitelistEmailValidator`1
member.summary: Validates that a user's email address is whitelisted.
member.typeparam: The user type, which must inherit from IdentityUser<Guid>.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.PasswordValidator
member.summary: Provides validation logic for passwords based on organizational rules.

member.name: F:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.PasswordValidator.MinimumLength
member.summary: The minimum required length for a valid password.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.PasswordValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary:
Provides validation for user-created passwords according to organizational standards based on NIST SP 800-63B recommendations (adapted).
Current rules: 1. Password must be at least 10 characters long. 2. Password should be memorable but not easily guessable. 3. No composition rules (uppercase, numbers, symbols) are required. 4. Password must not be in the blacklist of disallowed values (e.g., common or compromised passwords). 5. Password must not be null, empty, or whitespace.
Future extensions: - Passwords could be validated against a database table of blacklisted values. - Passwords could be checked against breach data APIs (e.g. HaveIBeenPwned). - Multi-factor authentication could be enforced separately.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.PasswordValidator.CheckNotEmpty(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Checks if the password is not empty or whitespace and adds an error if it is.
member.param: The list to which error messages are added.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.PasswordValidator.CheckMinimumLength(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Checks if the password meets the minimum length requirement and adds an error if it does not.
member.param: The list to which error messages are added.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.PasswordValidator.CheckBlacklist(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Checks if the password is present in the blacklist and adds an error if it is.
member.param: The list to which error messages are added.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.UsernameRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the UsernameRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.UsernameRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.UsernameRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.UsernameRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.UsernameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.UsernameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.UsernameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.UsernameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.UsernameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.
